prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of phenol (13 atoms) was computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet with cation and anion doublets for f⁺/f⁻ determination). Single-point calculation on the supplied geometry. Most electrophilic site: atom 3 (C), f⁺ = 2.1028. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f⁻ = 0.1620. Full Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor Δf) computed per atom. SCF converged; charge-conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.0000, sum f⁻ = 1.0000). No warnings reported.
